allow: Bash(node -e "const os=require\('os'\);const ifaces=os.networkInterfaces\(\);for\(const n of Object.keys\(ifaces\)\){for\(const i of ifaces[n]\){if\(i.family==='IPv4'&&!i.internal\)console.log\(n+': '+i.address\);}}")
PowerShell(Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq "Up" } | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, MacAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-NetRoute -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.DestinationPrefix -eq "0.0.0.0/0" } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, NextHop, RouteMetric | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\PMP-programs-for-sharawi\\final-pmp\\scripts" -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "----- db dir -----"; Get-ChildItem "D:\\PMP-programs-for-sharawi\\final-pmp\\src\\db" -File | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "----- dist dir -----"; if \(Test-Path "D:\\PMP-programs-for-sharawi\\final-pmp\\dist"\) { Get-ChildItem "D:\\PMP-programs-for-sharawi\\final-pmp\\dist" | Select-Object Name, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} } else { Write-Output "no dist dir" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; if\(Test-Path "D:/PMP-programs-for-sharawi/final-pmp/_smoketest.log"\){ $c = Get-Content "D:/PMP-programs-for-sharawi/final-pmp/_smoketest.log" -Raw; if\($c -match 'listening on'\){ $ok=$true; break } } }; Write-Output "waited $\($i+1\)s, serverUp=$ok"; Write-Output "----- log -----"; if\(Test-Path "D:/PMP-programs-for-sharawi/final-pmp/_smoketest.log"\){ Get-Content "D:/PMP-programs-for-sharawi/final-pmp/_smoketest.log" -Tail 40 })
